nodes.name: Blackstart
nodes.summary: Blackstart（Blackstart，学名 Oenanthe melanura），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blackstart (Oenanthe melanura) is a chat found in desert regions in North Africa, the Middle East and the Arabian Peninsula

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: * In Egypt, the blackstart is common in the Sinai Peninsula * In Israel the species is primarily found in the Negev Desert, Arava Valley and Dead Sea areas; it is present in areas of the Jordan River valley further north, but is scarcer there

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: * In Jordan, the species is only found in western parts of the country, in areas from the Jordan River valley south through the Dead Sea region to the Arava Valley and Aqaba Mountains
